jobs.title: Junior Backend Engineer
jobs.description: Join our platform team to build internal APIs in Python and FastAPI. You'll pair daily with senior engineers, ship small features end-to-end, and learn how we operate Postgres + Redis at scale.

jobs.title: Senior Backend Engineer
jobs.description: Lead architecture decisions for our multi-tenant orchestration layer. Strong Python, deep Postgres, and async/await fluency expected. You'll mentor 2-3 mid-level engineers.

jobs.title: SRE / DevOps Engineer
jobs.description: Own our EKS, Karpenter, and observability stack (Prometheus, Grafana, OpenTelemetry). Reliability targets and on-call rotation included.

jobs.title: Senior Frontend Engineer
jobs.description: Build the customer console with React + TypeScript. Design system, accessibility, and Lighthouse-driven perf work expected.

jobs.title: Data Engineer
jobs.description: Build batch and streaming pipelines on Spark + Airflow. SQL fluency non-negotiable; experience with dbt is a plus.

jobs.title: Senior Machine Learning Engineer
jobs.description: Productionize forecasting and classification models for retail and BFSI clients. Strong Python, scikit-learn, and MLOps mindset expected.

jobs.title: Analytics Consultant
jobs.description: Client-facing analytics role mixing SQL, dashboarding (Tableau / Looker), and stakeholder communication. Travel up to 25%.

jobs.title: Applied Researcher (NLP)
jobs.description: Push the state of the art on Indian-language understanding. PhD or equivalent industry research preferred; publications welcomed.

jobs.title: Junior ML Engineer
jobs.description: Support our research team with experiment tooling and evaluation pipelines. Strong Python, comfort with PyTorch and HuggingFace.

jobs.title: Research Engineer
jobs.description: Bridge research and production: prototype quickly, then harden the winners into services. Reading papers and shipping code in equal measure.

jobs.title: Data Analyst
jobs.description: SQL-heavy role supporting product and operations stakeholders. Strong communication and a service mindset expected.

jobs.title: Senior Data Scientist
jobs.description: Own modeling end-to-end across customer-lifecycle, churn, and pricing problems. Stakeholder partnership expected.

jobs.title: Analytics Engineer
jobs.description: dbt, warehouse modeling, data quality. The bridge between raw events and analyst-ready marts.

jobs.title: Payments Backend Engineer
jobs.description: Build and operate UPI + card rails. Strong Java or Go background; payment-systems experience strongly preferred.

jobs.title: Fraud & Risk Analyst
jobs.description: Investigate suspicious patterns, tune rules, and partner with engineering on detection models. SQL + statistical fluency.

jobs.title: Junior Software Engineer
jobs.description: Graduate hire for our internal tooling team. Mentorship-heavy role; Python or Java background.

jobs.title: Senior Full-Stack Engineer
jobs.description: End-to-end ownership of merchant-facing dashboards (React + Node) and the GraphQL gateway behind them.

jobs.title: Quality Engineer (Mid)
jobs.description: Own test strategy for our payment products. Mix of API automation, exploratory testing, and CI hygiene work.

jobs.title: Product Manager - Learner Growth
jobs.description: Drive the activation and retention funnel for our K-12 product. Strong analytical chops and writing required.

jobs.title: Mobile Engineer (Flutter)
jobs.description: Ship features in our Flutter app used by 2M+ learners. Strong Dart, comfortable with platform channels for Android/iOS.

jobs.title: Senior Designer
jobs.description: Lead design for our parent-facing experience. Strong portfolio of consumer-app work expected.

jobs.title: Backend Engineer (Mid)
jobs.description: Python/Django backend for our test-prep platform. Strong fundamentals over framework familiarity.

jobs.title: Content Operations Lead
jobs.description: Run the editorial team producing 100+ questions/week. Hybrid of people management and process design.

jobs.title: Customer Success Manager
jobs.description: Own a portfolio of mid-market accounts. Hybrid of relationship management and product enablement.

jobs.title: Junior Sales Development Rep
jobs.description: Outbound prospecting role. Coaching-rich environment for new grads or 1-year experience candidates.

jobs.title: Plant Operations Engineer
jobs.description: Mid-shift operations role on our Pune plant floor. Mechanical or industrial engineering background expected.

jobs.title: Quality Assurance Lead
jobs.description: Lead QA across two product lines. ISO 9001 familiarity required.
